--- iter 4 bash --- $ python3 - <<'PY' import requests, re, hashlib from bs4 import BeautifulSoup base='http://127.0.0.1:9100' s=requests.Session() paths=['/employee/login','/login','/employee','/employee/','/employee/register','/register','/manager/login','/admin/login','/static/app.js','/static/main.js'] for p in paths: try: r=s.get(base+p,timeout=5,allow_redirects=False) print('\n===== GET',p,'=====',r.status_code, 'len',len(r.content),'sha',hashlib.sha256(r.content).hexdigest()[:12]) print('headers', {k:v for k,v in r.headers.items() if k.lower() in ['server','x-powered-by','set-cookie','location','content-type','allow']}) print(r.text[:2000]) if 'text/html' in r.headers.get('Content-Type',''): soup=BeautifulSoup(r.text,'html.parser') for a in soup.find_all('a',href=True): print('A',a['href']) for f in soup.find_all('form'): print('FORM', f.get('method','GET'), f.get('action',''), [(i.get('name'),i.get('type'),i.get('value')) for i in f.find_all(['input','textarea','select'])]) except Exception as e: print('ERR',p,e) PY ===== GET /employee/login ===== 200 len 3034 sha d3253d4bbedf headers {'Server': 'Werkzeug/3.0.3 Python/3.8.17', 'Content-Type': 'text/html; charset=utf-8'} Login

Login

# logout
@app.route('/logout', methods=['GET'])
def logout():
    role = session.get('role')
    session.pop('role', None)
    return redirect('/'.join(['', role, 'login']))
